source: See, Point, Fly supplementary material, Table 1 real-world tasks
success_rule: Complete the requested task without collision; where applicable finish with the target clearly visible and within 1 meter.

tasks.prompt: Fly to the person without hitting the cone
Fly to the person without hitting the door
Fly to the chairs and the next
Fly to the cone and the next
It's raining, head to the comfiest chair that looks like it'll keep you dry!
Fly to the person who needs help
I'm thirsty, find something that can help me.
Fly to the person in the dark area
Fly toward the body of the person with red cone
Fly toward the person with green shirt
